source_lists.title: Romanian Cinema
source_lists.desc:
A list featuring some of the best Romanian films.
Open for suggestions.

source_lists.title: Romanian Cinema
source_lists.desc:
All the Romanian films I can remember having seen. My favorites are The Death of Mr. Lazarescu, The Stone Wedding, and The Oak.

Recommended lists:
- euler0’s Romanian Cinema
- purecinema1’s ROMANIA
- Ronan Doyle’s Riding the Wave: A Guide to the New Romanian Cinema
- cfillak’s Asociatia Criticilor de Film’s Best Romanian Films
- Angelo Defanti’s Romênia
- Miltin’s VAMO RUMANIA
- lchifi’s Romanian Movies
